description: Write-operation tests for RFC 6901 JSON Pointers with RFC 6902 section 4 operation semantics (add/replace/remove) plus the set() upsert with intermediate creation. Cases named rfc6902_a* mirror the corresponding RFC 6902 Appendix A examples.

tests.name: rfc6902_a1_add_object_member
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.1: add an object member

tests.name: rfc6902_a2_add_array_element
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.2: add inserts into an array, shifting right

tests.name: rfc6902_a3_remove_object_member
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.3: remove an object member

tests.name: rfc6902_a4_remove_array_element
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.4: remove an array element, shifting left

tests.name: rfc6902_a5_replace_value
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.5: replace an existing value

tests.name: rfc6902_a10_add_nested_object
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.10: add a nested member object

tests.name: rfc6902_a12_add_to_nonexistent_target
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.12: add fails when the parent does not exist

tests.name: rfc6902_a16_add_array_value
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.16: a whole array is added as a single value

tests.name: add_replaces_existing_member
tests.description: RFC 6902 4.1: add on an existing object member replaces its value

tests.name: add_root_replaces_document
tests.description: RFC 6902 4.1: the empty pointer replaces the whole document

tests.name: replace_root_replaces_document
tests.description: Replace with the empty pointer targets the root, which always exists

tests.name: remove_root_fails
tests.description: The root cannot be removed

tests.name: add_array_append_via_dash
tests.description: The - token appends to an array

tests.name: add_array_append_via_size_index
tests.description: Index == size appends to an array

tests.name: add_array_index_past_end_fails
tests.description: Index > size is out of range for add

tests.name: add_array_leading_zero_index_fails
tests.description: A leading-zero token cannot index an array

tests.name: add_dash_as_object_member
tests.description: Container-relative: on an object, - is an ordinary member name

tests.name: add_numeric_object_member
tests.description: Container-relative: a numeric token names an object member

tests.name: replace_missing_member_fails
tests.description: RFC 6902 4.3: replace requires the target to exist

tests.name: replace_array_element
tests.description: Replace an existing array element in place

tests.name: replace_dash_fails
tests.description: The - token designates a nonexistent element; replace must fail

tests.name: replace_index_out_of_range_fails
tests.description: Replace past the end of an array fails

tests.name: remove_dash_fails
tests.description: The - token designates a nonexistent element; remove must fail

tests.name: remove_missing_member_fails
tests.description: RFC 6902 4.2: remove requires the target to exist

tests.name: remove_index_out_of_range_fails
tests.description: Remove past the end of an array fails

tests.name: remove_nested_value
tests.description: Remove deep in a mixed object/array structure

tests.name: add_deep_nested
tests.description: Add deep in a mixed object/array structure keeps siblings intact

tests.name: add_through_scalar_fails
tests.description: A scalar in the path cannot be traversed

tests.name: add_escaped_member
tests.description: Escape sequences are decoded before writing

tests.name: add_empty_key_member
tests.description: The empty token names the empty-string member

tests.name: root_array_add
tests.description: Writes work on documents with an array root

tests.name: root_array_remove
tests.description: Remove from an array-rooted document

tests.name: set_defaults_to_add
tests.description: set without options behaves exactly like add

tests.name: set_without_create_fails_on_missing_parent
tests.description: set without createIntermediates keeps RFC 6902 add semantics

tests.name: set_create_object_chain
tests.description: createIntermediates builds missing object levels

tests.name: set_create_array_for_index_zero
tests.description: A created intermediate becomes an array when the next token is index 0

tests.name: set_create_array_for_dash
tests.description: A created intermediate becomes an array when the next token is -

tests.name: set_create_numeric_key_makes_object
tests.description: A nonzero numeric next token creates an object (no null-padding of arrays)

tests.name: set_create_appends_to_existing_array
tests.description: createIntermediates may extend an existing array at the append position

tests.name: set_create_index_gap_fails
tests.description: createIntermediates never null-pads arrays; a gap index fails

tests.name: set_create_replaces_null
tests.description: A JSON null in the path counts as empty and is replaced by a container

tests.name: set_create_never_overwrites_scalar
tests.description: createIntermediates must not overwrite an existing scalar in the path

tests.name: set_create_dash_mid_path_appends
tests.description: With createIntermediates, - as an intermediate step appends a created container

tests.name: add_dash_mid_path_fails
tests.description: Without createIntermediates, - designates a nonexistent element and cannot be traversed

tests.name: set_create_nested_arrays
tests.description: createIntermediates chains array creation when consecutive next tokens are 0

tests.name: add_mid_path_index_equal_size_fails
tests.description: Without createIntermediates an intermediate index == size does not exist

tests.name: remove_escaped_member
tests.description: Escape sequences are decoded for remove targets

tests.name: add_exponent_token_vs_array_fails
tests.description: RFC 6902 A.13 shape: a token like 1e0 is not an array index

tests.name: add_null_value
tests.description: Adding an explicit JSON null stores null

tests.name: replace_with_container
tests.description: Replace a scalar leaf with a container value
